title: Keely Aggregation PASS: 5 laws mapped to QA state composition/decomposition
_fixture_purpose: Certifies Keely's 5 aggregation/disintegration laws (Category 4, Vibes framework). Non-isolated states couple (Law 3); orbit density = effective pitch (Law 12); discord = dissociation (Laws 28,34); pitch determines orbit deterministically (Law 35).

3.name: Law of Corporeal Oscillations
3.keely_text: All coherent aggregates not isolated from like bodies oscillate at a period-frequency varying with the tensions
3.qa_mapping: When states interact (not isolated), coupling tension modifies effective behavior. Satellite (8-cycle) is bounded by tension; cosmos (24-cycle) extends far from equilibrium.
3.aggregation_aspect: Non-isolated states modify each other's effective period

12.name: Law of Oscillating Atomic Substances
12.keely_text: Coherent atomic substances are capable of oscillating at a pitch varying directly as the density
12.qa_mapping: Orbit density = how many states occupy a region. Cosmos has 72 states (high density), satellite has 8 (low density). Pitch varies directly as density per Law 12.
12.aggregation_aspect: Density of state occupation determines effective pitch

28.name: Law of Chemical Dissociation
28.keely_text: If the pitch of either atom in a molecule be raised or lowered until the mutual ratio be that of a discord
28.qa_mapping: Perturbation moving f-value out of concordance causes pair to dissociate — no shared orbit or resonance. Generator-driven orbit ejection.

34.name: Law of Atomic Dissociation
34.keely_text: Overtones of high rad-energy pitches produce separation of the atomoles and recombinations among the atomolic molecules
34.qa_mapping: High-energy perturbation disrupts modular structure; equivalent to orbit reassignment under forced conditions.
34.aggregation_aspect: External energy forces new orbit assignment

35.name: Law of Atomolic Synthesis of Chemical Elements
35.keely_text: Harmonic pitches of atomolity produce association of etheric-atomolic particles to form atoms; the kind of atom is determinable by the pitches employed
35.qa_mapping: Given f-values (pitches), the resulting QA tuple is fully determined. (b,e) determines (b,e,d,a) uniquely. Kind of atom = orbit family membership.

orbit_density.note: Cosmos: 72 states / 24-cycle; Satellite: 8 states / 8-cycle; density ratio reflects effective pitch

deterministic_synthesis.rule: Given (b,e) and modulus m, d=qa_mod(b+e,m), a=qa_mod(b+2e,m) — the full tuple is uniquely determined
deterministic_synthesis.orbit_rule: f = b*b+b*e-e*e; orbit family determined by v_3(f)

witnesses.note: Same orbit — coupling enhances (Law 3: tensions augment equilibrium)

witnesses.cosmos_density: 72 states in 24-period cycle = 3 states per step
witnesses.satellite_density: 8 states in 8-period cycle = 1 state per step
witnesses.singularity_density: 1 state in 1-period cycle = 1 state per step
witnesses.note: Cosmos has highest density = highest effective pitch per Keely's direct relationship (Law 12: pitch varies directly as density)
Pitch (b=2,e=1) uniquely determines full tuple and orbit (Law 35)

cross_references.name: QA Keely Sympathetic Transfer Cert
cross_references.relation: Sibling: transfer mechanisms that aggregation laws depend on
